catalogMetaDescription: Published categories and products delivered from Darwin.WebApi.
productFallbackMetaDescription: Storefront product detail delivered from Darwin.WebApi.
heroTitle: Storefront catalog now reads from Darwin.WebApi
heroDescription: Categories and product cards are now driven by the public catalog contracts. This keeps storefront work aligned with real CMS/catalog data instead of placeholder-only pages.
currentResultsNote: published products in this server query
visibleOffersNote: cards with compare-at pricing on this page
degradedTitle: Storefront data is running in degraded mode.
degradedMessage: Categories: {categoriesStatus}. Products: {productsStatus}. The page stays available, but public API connectivity or payload quality needs attention.
visibleToolsDescription: These controls only refine the products already loaded for the current server page. Global storefront search, facets, and server-side sorting still need WebApi expansion.
visibleSearchPlaceholder: Filter the products already shown on this page
visibleLensActiveMessage: {count} of {loadedCount} products on this page match the current visible-result tools. The full catalog total remains {serverTotal} until WebApi exposes global search, facets, and sorting.
categoryFallbackDescription: Category detail content is currently limited to the public category summary contract.
noResultsTitle: No published products matched this category yet.
noResultsDescription: The storefront shell stays stable, but catalog content for this slice is empty. This is now observable instead of silently hiding behind placeholders.
productDescriptionFallback: Published product card delivered from the public catalog surface.
productUnavailableMessage: The public product endpoint returned status "{status}". This is now visible in the storefront instead of failing silently.
productDataWarningsMessage: The primary detail fetch reported status "{status}". The page still renders what it could resolve from the current API response.
primaryCategoryUnknown: Primary category metadata is not available in the current storefront route context.
mediaCountMessage: {count} published media items are available for this product detail.
noMediaGalleryMessage: No published media gallery was returned, so the storefront is using the explicit no-media fallback.
noVariantsMessage: No published variant snapshots were returned for this product.
cannotAddToCartTitle: This product cannot be added to cart yet.
cannotAddToCartMessage: No published variant snapshot is currently available for the storefront add-to-cart flow.
relatedProductsDescription: These recommendations stay inside the current public catalog contract by reusing the selected product's primary category.
relatedProductsEmptyMessage: No additional published products are currently visible for this category.
